script: For most of my adult life, I worked with things you can measure

props.quote: For most of my adult life, I worked with things you can measure.

script: Data. Models. Dashboards. The clean grammar of proof
a poem finds the exact nerve no dataset ever mapped

props.headline: A poem finds the nerve no dataset ever mapped

script: something releases. I didn't plan for that

lines: I don't have a framework for it.

script: I've stopped pretending the two lives are separate

script: I'm not the kind of person who cries at lines on a page

props.quote: I'm not the kind of person who cries at lines on a page. Except I am.
